name: boshu2/agentops
summary: DevOps-style operations layer for Codex CLI, Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode that persists handoffs, retros, and learnings in `.agents/`, then uses ratchet gates, multi-model councils, pre-mortems, and vibe checks so coding workflows carry evidence and compound knowledge across sessions.
evidence: Provides first-class Codex install paths alongside Claude Code, Cursor, and OpenCode, and shows Codex as a phase participant in RPI examples rather than a peripheral backend.
Ships Codex-specific plugin and skill assets under `.codex-plugin`, `.codex`, and `skills-codex/`, including mixed council judge support that can call Codex CLI judges.

Encodes an opinionated operating layer around `.agents/` records, ratchet progress gates, pre-mortems, vibe checks, councils, and learning flywheels so agent runs carry evidence and constraints across sessions.
